subject: Commercial paint sub for Manitoba
body:
Hi Keith,

Quick intro — Lio at Ashrah Painting, Winnipeg commercial.

Most painting subs make your PM chase for status. Calls, missed updates, dings on finished surfaces at handoff. We do it differently: Lumia auto-reports daily plus answers your PM on demand. Lumi (our AI estimator) returns 95%-detailed bids in 24 hours, at least 13% lower than human-estimated subs.

Worth 10 minutes to walk you through it?
cta: Worth 10 minutes to walk you through it?
signals_used: No public signals on Durango — generic cold open.
